title: Eskom EAF Reaches 62% — Milestone Achieved
message: Eskom's Energy Availability Factor has reached 62% for the first time since 2019, enabling Stage 0 load shedding for 45 consecutive days. Generation Recovery Plan showing results.

title: Eskom Debt Relief Year 3 Tranche — Conditional Approval
message: National Treasury has conditionally approved the Year 3 debt relief tranche of ZAR 78 billion, subject to Eskom achieving EAF of 65% by 31 March 2025 and NTDC incorporation milestone.

title: Transnet Freight Rail — 195 Mtpa Target Achieved
message: Transnet Freight Rail has achieved 195 million tonnes per annum freight volumes in FY2024, up from 155 Mtpa in FY2023. Recovery plan showing significant progress.

title: SAA Takatso Transaction — Deadline Missed
message: SAA has not concluded the Takatso Consortium strategic equity partnership by the 31 December 2024 deadline. Alternative strategic options to be presented to DPEPE by 28 February 2025.

title: Denel Returns to Profitability — FY2024
message: Denel has reported a net profit of ZAR 180 million for FY2024, the first profitable year since FY2017. Revenue of ZAR 4.5 billion exceeded the ZAR 4 billion recapitalisation target.

title: SANRAL Clean Audit — FY2024
message: SANRAL has received a clean audit opinion from the Auditor-General for FY2024, the fifth consecutive clean audit. No irregular, fruitless or wasteful expenditure reported.
companyName: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
